gates.name: MT_RUNTIME_DISABLE
gates.detail: entry: sport=basket mkt=total side=over league=- reason="audit 2026-05-19 granular: shadow over n=9 ROI -16.6% NBA tier1 (small sample preventive)"
gates.env_fix: DELETE FROM market_tips_runtime_state WHERE sport='basket' AND market='total' AND source='manual'

notes: Gates simulados são determinísticos (env + DB). Gates runtime-dependent (CLV velocity, drawdown, /stake-multiplier, league_trust stake floor) NÃO são checados.
Se all_blockers=[] aqui, a tip AINDA pode cair em shadow por gate runtime (ex: drawdown taper, daily stop-loss).
